title: Device for purifying gas.
abstract: Device for purifying gas, wherein the device (1) substantially comprises a vessel (2) having an inlet (3) for gas to be purified and an outlet (4) for purified gas, wherein in the vessel (2) two or more blocks (6) of a purifying agent are arranged which are stacked on top of each other to form a stack (7), characterized in that a seal (8) is arranged between the stacked blocks (6), wherein the blocks (6) are being held together by: - an element (29) extending through the blocks (6); and/or - an enclosure (20) made of a non-elastic or flexible material which is arranged around the stack (7) of blocks (6); and/or - the fact that the seals (8) are glued to the blocks (6).
claims:
Claims 1.- Device for purifying gas, wherein the device (1) sunstantially comprises a vessel (2) having an inlet (3) for gas to be purified and an outlet (4) for purified gas, wherein in the vessel (2) two or more blocks (6) of a purifying agent are arranged which are stacked on top of each other to form a stack (7), characterized in that a seal (8) is arranged between the stacked blocks (6), wherein the blocks (6) are being held together by: - an element (29) extending through the blocks (6); and/or - an enclosure (20) made of a non-elastic or flexible material which is arranged around the stack (7) of blocks (6); and/or - the fact that the seals (8) are glued to the blocks (6). 2. Device according to claim 1, characterized in that the element (29) is a wire (30) arranged through the blocks (6). 3. Device according to claim 1, characterized in that the element (29) is a rod (31). 4. Device according to claim 3, characterized in that the rod (31) is provided at both ends with a nut (32) or the like for clamping the blocks (6) between the two nuts (32). 5. Device according to claim 3, characterized in that the rod (31) is provided at one end with a stop (33) or abutment for the blocks (6), which stop (33) or abutment is gas-permeable. 6. Device according to claim 5, characterized in that the other end of the rod (31) is provided with a nut (32) or the like. 7. Device according to claim 6, characterized in that a spring element (34) is arranged between the nut (32) and a block (6). 8. Device according to claim 1, characterized in that the enclosure (20) comprises 

 one or more portions (21a, 21b) which can be fastened together around the blocks (6). 9. Device according to claim 8, characterized in that the portions (21a, 21b) can be fastened to each other by means of a click system (22) or bolts or the like. 10. Device according to claim 1, characterized in that the enclosure (20) comprises a hose (23) or tube arranged around the blocks (6), wherein at both ends (24) of the hose (23) or tube an end cap (25) or cover is fitted. 11. Device according to one of the preceding claims 8 to 10, characterized in that the enclosure (20) is made of metal or plastic, or that the enclosure (20) comprises a lattice-shaped or mesh-shaped material. 12. Device according to claim 1, characterized in that the enclosure (20) is made up of several portions (26), each component (26) comprising a clamping system that can snap into two successive blocks (6). 13. Device according to claim 1, characterized in that the enclosure (20) is a coating (27) which is applied around the blocks (6). 14. Device according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized in that said seal (8) extends over the circumferential edges (10) of the blocks (6) stacked on top of each another, the seal (8) being constructed of a cylinder jacket (11) which is arranged over the circumferential edges (10) of the blocks (6) and consists of two V-shaped positioned lips (12) attached to the inside of the cylinder jacket (11) and facing inwards (12), extending between the blocks (6), wherein the free edges (13) of the cylinder shell (11) are unfolded away from the blocks (6). 15. Device according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized in that the outermost blocks (6) of the stack (7) of blocks (6) are provided on their free circumferential edge (10) with an end seal (9) which is designed as a V-shaped seal, which is slid over the respective circumferential edge (10), such that a first 

 leg (14) of the end seal (9) presses against the axial top surface (15) of the outermost block (6), while the second leg (16) of the end seal (9) presses against the radial outer wall (17) of the block (6), the end seal (9) being provided with a protrusion (18) where the two legs (14, 16) are connected to each other, wherein the free end (19) of the second leg (16) is unfolded away from the block. 16. Device according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized in that the stack (7) of blocks (6) is provided at its ends with an inlet element (35) and an outlet element (36), wherein one or more of the following components are provided in the inlet element (35): inlet filter; air distributor; seal; one or more flaps or valves; silencer; spring; spacer; water separator; and wherein one or more of the following are provided in the outlet element (36): exhaust filter; air distributor; seal; one or more flaps or valves; silencer; spring; spacer. 17. Device according to claims 7 and 16, characterized in that spring element (34) is integrated in the inlet element (35) or in the outlet element (36).
